name: Riskonnect Integrated Risk Management API
what_it_does: Riskonnect REST API for integrated risk management (IRM) platform. Enables AI agents to manage enterprise risk register and risk assessment data retrieval, handle insurance program and policy data management for corporate risk management, access claims management and incident reporting workflow for self-insured and captive programs, retrieve safety and loss prevention incident data for risk reduction analytics, manage business continuity and resilience planning data for BCM automation, handle compliance and regulatory tracking for enterprise risk management, access vendor and third-party risk assessment data integration, retrieve actuarial and loss modeling data for risk financing, manage captive insurance and alternative risk transfer program data, and integrate risk management data with ERP, HR, and enterprise analytics platforms.
use_cases: Managing enterprise risk register from ERM automation agents
Tracking insurance claims from captive management agents
Monitoring safety incidents from risk reduction agents
Integrating risk data with ERP from financial risk agents
not_for: Cybersecurity-only risk management without enterprise IRM and insurance focus
Small business without enterprise risk program complexity
Consumer risk without corporate enterprise risk management context
best_when: A corporate risk management team using Riskonnect wants AI agents to automate risk register management, claims tracking, incident reporting, business continuity planning, and enterprise analytics integration.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Enterprise risk management data contains sensitive financial and operational information — automated access requires strict RBAC and audit logging. Automated risk classification and scoring without risk manager review can misrepresent risk profile to executives and board. Claims automation without adjuster oversight can increase claims leakage.

auth.notes: Riskonnect uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Built on Salesforce platform (Force.com). Salesforce-compatible authentication and SOQL for data queries. No native webhooks — Salesforce platform event model available for integration. REST API documentation requires customer access. Integration with ERPs, TPA systems, and HR platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-user and module subscription; risk management, claims, and BCM separately priced
pricing.notes: Atlanta, Georgia. Founded 2005. Private (General Atlantic portfolio). Integrated risk management market. 2,000+ customers. Built on Salesforce platform. Strong in healthcare, financial services, and retail risk management. Acquired OnePoint Global (2020) for BCM. Competes with Origami Risk and ServiceNow for enterprise IRM market.

performance.rate_limits: Salesforce API governor limits apply; documented per Salesforce platform

known_agent_gotchas: SALESFORCE PLATFORM: Riskonnect is built on Salesforce; API access uses Salesforce OAuth and may require understanding Salesforce API patterns including governor limits
Governor limits — Salesforce platform applies API call limits per 24-hour window; high-volume risk data automation requires governor limit monitoring
SOQL for data queries — Salesforce Object Query Language for data retrieval; complex risk data queries require SOQL proficiency
Customer portal required — developer documentation requires active Riskonnect customer access; no public API reference
Module-specific APIs — risk register, claims, BCM, and safety have separate data models within Salesforce platform; understand module data model before automation
No webhooks — Salesforce platform events available for integration but require Salesforce org configuration; not a traditional webhook model
agent_readiness.security_notes: Integrated risk management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 (Salesforce). US/EU. Enterprise risk and claims data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise IRM. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Salesforce OAuth2. US/EU. Risk and insurance data.
